_comment: Area-id (lowercased WorldArea.Id) -> Radar tile-name pattern. Path fallback when no live entity resolves a step (e.g. {kill|Boss} whose boss isn't loaded yet -> path to the boss arena / zone exit tile). Tiles are static zone geometry so the path shows from area entry. Patterns MUST be bridge-usable: a literal tile name or a Metadata/...tdt path. NEVER a room '*' wildcard -- the Radar.ClusterTarget bridge drops the room filter, so '*' matches the whole map. Data copied from Radar targets.json (keyed by area RawName, e.g. G1_1). Keys MUST be the LIVE WorldArea.Id (lowercased) so they line up with the route header -- a 'suffixed variant' that differs from the live id (the old g2_3a, since fixed to g2_3) also breaks area-change auto-advance. g4_8a is still suspect: verify its live id and rename if it mismatches.
_low_confidence: g2_1 (Rathbreaker: no explicit arena tile, using the Raiders Cliffs landmark), g2_12_1 (Jamanra Abomination: true arena tile lives in sibling G2_12_2; locustmaster_cart is the nearest in-zone tile), g1_15 (holds the ACT BOSS Geonor arena; the zone also has the earlier Candlemass kill at Chapel_boss_01.tdt).
_unmapped: No bridge-usable tile in Radar targets.json: g2_4_1/Azarian (route reuses g2_4_1 for Heart of Keth; that key is the Kabala zone), g2_4_2/Ninth Treasure of Keth, g3_3/Mighty Silverfist (entity-only target), g3_12/Ketzuli, g3_14/Viper Napuatzi.
